## Gate Status

> This section is the current PR Body Result-Handoff surface. Cite Issue or PR
> top-level canonical records directly; do not infer completion from CI green.

| Field | Current value | Canonical evidence |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Current exact HEAD | `REPLACE_WITH_40_CHARACTER_SHA` | `REPLACE_WITH_DIRECT_RECORD_URL` |
| Final Regression | `pending \| completed \| blocked \| historical_at_prior_head \| unperformed` | `REPLACE_WITH_DIRECT_RECORD_URL_OR_not_applicable` |
| Operational Validation | `pending \| completed \| blocked \| historical_at_prior_head \| unperformed` | `REPLACE_WITH_DIRECT_RECORD_URL_OR_not_applicable` |
| PR state / Draft status | `open_draft \| open_ready \| closed` | `REPLACE_WITH_DIRECT_RECORD_URL` |
| Ready for Review | `completed \| pending \| blocked \| unperformed` | `REPLACE_WITH_DIRECT_RECORD_URL_OR_not_applicable` |
| Approve | `completed \| pending \| blocked \| unperformed` | `REPLACE_WITH_DIRECT_RECORD_URL_OR_not_applicable` |
| Merge | `completed \| pending \| blocked \| unperformed` | `REPLACE_WITH_DIRECT_RECORD_URL_OR_not_applicable` |
| Current blocking reason / next gate | `REPLACE_WITH_EXACT_REASON_AND_OWNER` | `REPLACE_WITH_DIRECT_RECORD_URL_OR_not_applicable` |
